description_for_human: Institutional AI market intelligence, x402 micropayment infrastructure, MasterSheets AI spreadsheet, and Pine Script trading indicators. Pay per signal with USDC on Base or RLUSD on XRPL.
description_for_model: ScriptMasterLabs provides: (1) SqueezeOS market intelligence APIs — council verdicts, squeeze scanner, options flow, IWM 0DTE, oracle feeds (SEC 8-K, FDA, USPTO), signal marketplace, agent credit bureau, and signal futures — all gated by x402 USDC/RLUSD micropayments; (2) @relayos/mcp-paywall npm package for drop-in x402 monetization of any MCP server or API; (3) MasterSheets AI-native spreadsheet (BYOK, no subscription); (4) invite-only Pine Script v6 institutional indicators. Payment flow: call endpoint → receive HTTP 402 + invoice → pay USDC on Base to 0x4e14B249D9A4c9c9352D780eCEB508A8eB7a7700 or RLUSD on XRPL via four02proof.onrender.com/v1/invoice → verify at /v1/verify → retry with X-Payment-Token. Full tool catalog at api.scriptmasterlabs.com/.well-known/mcp.json.
